Bug Report

🟡 BUG-01 — Medium | Exit Intent Coupon Invalid

Description: Clicking "Take 10% off" on exit intent banner adds offer=preview10 to URL correctly but shows "Invalid coupon code" toast — discount not applied to plan pricing.

Steps: Open preview → trigger exit intent → click "Take 10% off" → observe toast notification

Expected: Plans show discounted prices with 10% off applied

Actual: "Invalid coupon code" toast shown, prices unchanged

🔴 BUG-02 — High | Register API 500 (Intermittent)

Description: Backend /register endpoint intermittently returns HTTP 500, blocking navigation from preview to checkout after email submission.

Steps: Open preview → select plan → click Access Records → enter email → click Access Records in popup → stuck on preview page

Expected: Navigate to checkout page

Actual: API returns 500, no redirect

🔴 BUG-03 — High | UTM Params Not Saved in Cookies/Storage

Description: utm_details=copilot and traffic_source=chatgpt passed in URL are not persisted in cookies, localStorage, or sessionStorage. UTM tracking is completely broken.

Steps: Open preview?reg=RE09XC0&utm_details=copilot&traffic_source=chatgpt → check DevTools Application tab

Expected: UTM params saved in cookies or localStorage for attribution tracking

Actual: No UTM data found anywhere in browser storage
